prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低录取位次分别为约241名、286名、220名、571名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年因新高考首年科类转换（理科→物理类），位次从286名小幅前移至220名；2025年则大幅后移至571名，近两年累计后移约351名，基准位次明显松动；该校在甘肃省2021–2025年招生计划均为21人，保持稳定。2026年招生计划增至29人，较2025年扩招8人（增幅约38%），扩招幅度显著，将直接降低录取竞争烈度，使最低录取位次趋于后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属北京大学体系，软科主榜未单独排名，但作为中国最顶尖的医学院之一，其临床医学、口腔医学等学科长期位居全国前列，对高分考生具有极强吸引力；北京大学（本部）2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全与食堂宿舍等舆情，但医学部独立招生，受本部声誉波动影响有限；抖音热度排名第3（高热），整体曝光度极高；医学类专业社会关注度持续高涨，未见明显负面信号；临床医学（A）、口腔医学（A）、基础医学（A）、药学（A+）、公共卫生与预防医学（A）等均为全国顶尖水平，与招生专业高度对应，学科实力对考生报考意愿形成强支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业在2024年专业热度评估中均为推荐/偏热，口腔医学更因工作压力小、无需夜班等特点持续受追捧；本省2026年高考总人数约21.87万，按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算，物理类考生约14.76万人，较2025年增加约2.6万人（增幅约21.6%），考生规模扩大将加剧竞争；北京大学医学部位于北京市，属全国性顶尖院校，对甘肃省考生无地域偏好影响；该校在甘肃招生占比极小（约21–29人），跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次571名、2026年大幅扩招38%（计划从21人增至29人）带来的竞争缓解，以及本省物理类考生增加约21.6%带来的竞争加剧，扩招效应略强于考生增量效应，但医学类专业持续高热和学校顶尖层次对位次形成向上支撑。经，再结合考生规模扩大与专业热度做有限修正，预测2026年最低录取位次约732名，区间644–820名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）（色盲不予录取）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）（色盲不予录取）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（色盲不予录取）
- 口腔医学（色盲不予录取）
- 基础医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（七年制本硕连读）
- 药学（六年制本硕连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间644–820名内，建议以二档专业（临床医学五年制、口腔医学五年制、基础医学八年制）为主攻方向，一档长学制专业（临床/口腔八年制）作为冲刺，三档专业（预防医学、药学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如644名以内）可重点冲击一档本博连读专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this subject category were approximately 241, 286, 220, and 571, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao with subject category conversion (Science → Physics Category), the ranking slightly moved forward from 286 to 220; in 2025, it significantly moved backward to 571, with a cumulative backward shift of about 351 positions over the past two years, indicating a clear loosening of the baseline ranking. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu Province from 2021 to 2025 remained stable at 21 students. In 2026, the enrollment plan increased to 29 students, an expansion of 8 students (approximately 38%) compared to 2025. This significant expansion will directly reduce the intensity of admission competition, causing the minimum admission ranking to trend backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with the Peking University system. Although it is not separately ranked on the Soft Science main list, as one of China's top medical schools, its disciplines such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have long been among the best in the country, exerting a strong attraction for high-scoring students. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, the reputation evaluation of Peking University (main campus) is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety and dormitory/cafeteria issues, but the Health Science Center recruits independently, so the impact of the main campus's reputation fluctuations is limited. Its Douyin popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high overall exposure. Medical majors continue to receive high social attention, with no obvious negative signals. Clinical Medicine (A), Stomatology (A), Basic Medicine (A), Pharmacy (A+), and Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A) are all at the national top level, closely corresponding to the admission majors, and the strength of these disciplines strongly supports students' willingness to apply.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology were rated as recommended/slightly hot in the 2024 major popularity assessment. Stomatology is particularly sought after due to its low work pressure and lack of night shifts. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in this province is approximately 218,700. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 67.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 147,600, an increase of about 26,000 (approximately 21.6%) compared to 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool will intensify competition. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, a nationally top-tier institution, and has no regional preference impact on Gansu candidates. The university's enrollment in Gansu is very small (about 21–29 students), and the cross-provincial competition pattern is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 571 in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion of 38% in 2026 (plan increased from 21 to 29 students) which alleviates competition, and the increase of about 21.6% in Physics Category candidates in the province which intensifies competition, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. However, the sustained high popularity of medical majors and the top-tier level of the university provide upward support for the ranking. After further limited adjustments based on the candidate pool expansion and major popularity, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 732, with a range of 644–820.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year Bachelor-Doctor Program) (Color blindness not admitted)
- Stomatology (8-year Bachelor-Doctor Program) (Color blindness not admitted).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine (Color blindness not admitted)
- Stomatology (Color blindness not admitted)
- Basic Medicine (8-year Bachelor-Doctor Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine (7-year Bachelor-Master Program)
- Pharmacy (6-year Bachelor-Master Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 644–820, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine 5-year, Stomatology 5-year, Basic Medicine 8-year) as the main direction, Tier 1 long-program majors (Clinical/Stomatology 8-year) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 644), one can focus on challenging Tier 1 Bachelor-Doctor programs.
